subject: fix(security): enable RLS on PostGIS spatial_ref_sys table
body:
PostGIS creates spatial_ref_sys in the public schema when the extension
is enabled. Without RLS, it's accessible to the anon role via PostgREST
with no authorization filtering. Enable RLS with a read-only policy
since PostGIS functions need to read coordinate system definitions.

Tags: security, database, rls, postgis
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: security-hardening
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NznLYRXfKT1d4frhKMrwtU
title: enable RLS on PostGIS spatial_ref_sys table
